stemHtml: As a contingency against a total INS / IRS failure and in order to be able to continue navigating safely while flying in polar regions, the Flight Crew should, at regular intervals…

options.a: record the true heading indications and the time on the navigation log.
options.b: record the magnetic compass indications on the navigation log.
options.c: plot the aircraft`s planned track on a polar stereographic chart.
options.d: plot the aircraft`s position and the time on a polar stereographic chart.
